# mds-details



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property | Attribute | Description                          | Type      | Default     |
| -------- | --------- | ------------------------------------ | --------- | ----------- |
| `opened` | `opened`  | Specifies if the component is opened | `boolean` | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event         | Description                        | Type                |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| `openedEvent` | Emits when the component is opened | `CustomEvent<void>` |


## CSS Custom Properties

| Name                  | Description                                                    |
| --------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `--helper-icon-color` | Sets the box-shadow of the component when the mouse is over it |
| `--icon-color`        | Sets the box-shadow of the component when the mouse is over it |
